overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury high-rise apartment in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a bathroom to a bedroom with panoramic views of Night City's industrial skyline through floor-to-ceiling windows. The footage showcases ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic interior design.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic apartment bathroom transitioning to bedroom

events.description: sliding door opens revealing bedroom and city view through large window
bright natural sunlight from floor-to-ceiling window floods the space

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow bathroom with marble floors and a glass shower, then transitions through a sliding door into a spacious bedroom. Bright natural light floods in through a massive window revealing Night City's industrial skyline, including a distinctive tower with smoke stacks.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bedroom with panoramic city views

events.description: camera slows and begins panning right to capture more of the cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking slowly toward the window while observing the industrial cityscape outside

entered.detail: industrial smoke stacks emitting white smoke visible through window

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the bedroom, the camera passes the lounge chair and coffee table while maintaining focus on the city view. The industrial tower shifts to the left of frame as smoke stacks become visible in the center, with sunlight casting sharp shadows across the wooden floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom corner near window with extended city view

events.description: flying vehicle passes by outside the window in the distance

agents.ego_description: standing near the bed and looking out at the right portion of the cityscape

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated '07' signage on the facade
small aerial vehicle flying between buildings outside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the bed and pans right to reveal more of the city, including a building marked '07'. The industrial tower is now prominently on the left side while the bed fills the center foreground. A flying vehicle briefly appears in the distance outside the window.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a luxury bathroom into a sprawling bedroom that opens onto a panoramic industrial skyline. It begins within a narrow space of marble floors and glass, gliding through a sliding door as the interior expands and bright natural light floods the room. As the camera moves deeper into the bedroom, it passes a lounge chair and coffee table, shifting the perspective so that the distant smoke stacks of Night City move toward the center of the frame while sharp shadows stretch across the wooden floor. The scene then advances toward the bed, panning right to reveal a building marked 07 and a flying vehicle drifting through the hazy distance. Finally, the industrial tower settles on the left side of the frame as the bed fills the foreground, completing the transition from the enclosed interior to the vast urban expanse.
